# viettelidc_vks_node_group (Resource)

Provides a VKS Node Group resource.

> **Note:** Creation is explicitly disabled via Terraform. Use `terraform import` to manage existing Node Groups.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the K8s Cluster.
- `desired_size` (Number) Desired number of nodes in the Node Group. Must be between minimum and maximum size.
- `instance_type` (String) Instance type of the workers.
- `max_size` (Number) Maximum number of nodes in the Node Group.
- `min_size` (Number) Minimum number of nodes in the Node Group. Cannot be less than 1.
- `name` (String) Name of the Node Group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) ID of the Node Group.
- `status` (String) Status of the Node Group.
